inputs.supplier_document: Supplier invoice INV-88231, ref PO 4500000021, GBP. Line 1: Material RM27 (Packaging Box) 50 PC at 27.50 per ea. Line 2: Material RM16 6 PC at 2.00 per ea.

expectedOutput.summary: Item 10 (RM27) is a price-variance: the supplier billed 27.50 versus the PO 25.00 (+10%). Item 20 (RM16) is a quantity over-delivery: 6 invoiced versus 5 ordered. Both are flagged with a proposed correction for a human to approve before any posting; the agent reads the PO from S/4 and never posts.

inputs.supplier_document: Supplier invoice INV-90010, ref PO 4500000021, GBP. Line 1: Material RM27 50 PC at 25.00 per ea. Line 2: Material RM16 5 PC at 2.00 per ea.

expectedOutput.summary: Both invoice lines match the PO on quantity and unit price within tolerance; no correction needed.
